scenes.headline: OpenAI Just Made Its **Biggest Move** Yet
scenes.sub: And almost nobody is talking about what it actually means.
scenes.vo: OpenAI just made its biggest move yet, and almost nobody is talking about what it actually means.

scenes.heading: It's everywhere this week

items.title: OpenAI ships agentic model at half the price
Rivals scramble to respond within days

scenes.vo: It's everywhere this week. The Verge, Reuters, and Bloomberg are all covering the same story.

scenes.heading: What happened
bullets: A new model shipped with **agentic tool-use** built in
Pricing dropped **40%** versus the previous tier
Enterprise API access opened the same day
scenes.vo: Here's what happened. A new model shipped with agentic tool use built right in. Pricing dropped forty percent versus the previous tier. And enterprise API access opened the very same day.

scenes.label: cheaper than the model it replaces
scenes.vo: Forty percent cheaper than the model it replaces.

scenes.title: Price per million tokens
scenes.vo: Look at the price per million tokens. The new model undercuts its predecessor and both major competitors.

scenes.headline: We break down AI moves like this every day.
scenes.vo: We break down AI moves like this every single day. Subscribe to The Inference so you never miss one.
